sys_script_client.description:
RAJ - STRY0063655 - Only on new Form - Show and hide Primary Assignee, Assigned Member, Subtask Primary Assignee(s) and Subtask Assigned Member(s).
NOTE: I tried to do this in a UI Policy, but Parent is not on the New form for a new task. Portal pages don't apply ui policy well when fields not in the form are needed for the condition. So, logic was moved here.
sys_script_client.name: Template - onChange Show CDS Asgmt field
sys_script_client.sys_name: Template - onChange Show CDS Asgmt field
